creator: gemiel@gmail.com
text:
Port 'musicpd' continually issues the following warning:

Sep  7 16:24:51 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
Sep  7 16:24:51 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
Sep  7 16:24:51 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
Sep  7 16:24:56 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
Sep  7 16:24:56 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
Sep  7 16:24:56 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005
Sep  7 16:25:46 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045006
Sep  7 16:25:46 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045002
Sep  7 16:25:46 mad kernel: WARNING pid 89438 (mpd): ioctl sign-extension ioctl ffffffffc0045005

Fix: 

I'm guessing this issue only crops up on 64 bit platforms...
How-To-Repeat: Issue any command, i.e. using the mpc client (mpc next).
